title: Sales Analytics Pipeline
description: Build an end-to-end medallion architecture for sales data from two source systems: the AdventureWorks SQL Server database (orders and products) and a SharePoint-hosted Excel file (regional targets). Raw data must land in Bronze, be cleansed and typed in Silver, and produce KPI aggregates in Gold. Diagrams must reflect the split-workspace topology where Bronze ingestion, Silver cleansing, and Gold analytics each live in separate Fabric workspaces.
acceptance_criteria:
- SQL Server orders and products tables ingested daily into Bronze lakehouse
- SharePoint regional targets file ingested weekly
- Silver layer deduplicates and enforces schema on all three tables
- Gold layer computes monthly revenue, units sold, and target attainment per region
- Power BI Sales Dashboard reads from Gold via a Direct Lake semantic model
- All pipelines scheduled and monitored

title: HR Data Platform
description: Centralise HR data from the SAP SuccessFactors daily CSV export into a single Fabric workspace. The platform must cover all three medallion layers (Bronze raw landing, Silver cleansed employee records, Gold headcount and attrition KPIs) plus a warehouse for ad-hoc SQL queries by the People Analytics team. All layers share a single HR Platform workspace.
acceptance_criteria:
- SAP CSV export ingested daily via pipeline into bronze_hr_lakehouse
- Silver layer cleanses employee records: normalise job grades, fill nulls, enforce date formats
- Gold layer aggregates headcount by department and month, computes 12-month rolling attrition rate
- HR_Analytics_Warehouse exposes Gold tables via SQL endpoint
- HR Semantic Model and HR Headcount Report published to Power BI
